# Shanjid Ahmad — Full-Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio site for Shanjid Ahmad, a full-stack web developer with 5+ years of experience building production-grade applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL.

## About

Shanjid Ahmad is a Bangladeshi full-stack developer and co-founder of UIX Design Lab, a web design and development agency. He specializes in building multi-app ecosystems, REST and WebSocket APIs, e-commerce platforms, and open-source developer tooling.

- **Location:** Bangladesh
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/levi9111
- **Upwork:** https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~0170afa1a35aac844c
- **Email:** shanjidahmad502@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/shanjid-ahmad

## Featured Projects

### Texor — Crypto Trading Platform
Full-featured cryptocurrency exchange platform with real-time market data, wallet integration, and secure trading infrastructure. Built with React, Node.js, MongoDB, WebSocket, JWT, and Redis. Role: Lead Full-Stack Engineer. Status: Live at texor.cloud.

### UIX Design Lab — Agency Website
Co-founder and developer of a web design agency platform featuring an admin ERP dashboard and a public-facing client site. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS, and GSAP. Status: Live at uixdesignlab.com.

### Subaashghor — E-commerce Ecosystem
Four-app commerce ecosystem (web storefront, admin ERP, API server, mobile app) for a luxury goods retailer. Built with React, Node.js, MongoDB, Stripe, and AWS. Role: Full-Stack Architect. Status: In Production.

### create-express-modular — Open-Source CLI
npm-published CLI scaffolding tool that generates modular Express.js/NestJS backend projects with pre-configured authentication, Zod validation, Mongoose modeling, and CI/CD setup. 1 NPM package, MIT licensed. GitHub: https://github.com/levi9111/npm-create-express-modular

### TaskFlow — Real-Time Task Management Platform
Full-stack collaborative task management platform with WebSocket-based real-time updates, Kanban board UI, NestJS backend, Redis caching, and PostgreSQL. GitHub: https://github.com/Levi9111/task-master-api

## Technical Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, HTML5, CSS3  
**Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, REST APIs, WebSocket (Socket.io)  
**Databases:** MongoDB, Mongoose, PostgreSQL  
**Tools:** Git, Docker, AWS, Vercel, Jest, Webpack, Zod, JWT  
**Design:** Figma, Responsive Design, Accessibility

## Engineering Principles

- Strict TypeScript across the full stack with Zod schema validation at every request boundary
- Consistent error handling via catchAsync, AppError class, and unified sendResponse shape
- Modular architecture by default — features are self-contained with their own routes, controllers, and schemas
- GPU-safe animations with Framer Motion, respecting `useReducedMotion`
- Test coverage, documentation, and code reviews treated as part of shipping, not cleanup

## Services

- Full-Stack Web Applications (React / Next.js frontends + Node.js/NestJS APIs)
- API Architecture & Backend Systems
- E-commerce Platforms (storefront + admin + payment integration)
- Open-Source Tooling (CLIs, scaffolding generators, npm packages)
